name: Table Lamp with Fabric Base and Shade Pink - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Add a charming accent to any room with this Fabric Base with Fabric Shade Table Lamp from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Featuring a pink fabric base paired with a scalloped drum shade with white detailing, this table lamp brings a sweet touch to nightstands, dressers, or side tables. The inline cord rocker switch offers easy on/off control, while the five-foot cord allows for versatile placement.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
